body: Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to share a few thoughts on the [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) deal before you head into your partner meeting on Friday. I've seen a handful of grid-edge infrastructure plays at this stage and the unit economics here feel a bit stretched for a seed round, particularly the assumptions baked into their year-two customer acquisition model. That said, the founding team's background in FERC compliance is genuinely rare and I don't want you to let that slip away over a valuation quibble. My suggestion would be to push for a 15% lower pre-money and offer a pro-rata right in lieu of a board seat for now — it keeps your exposure manageable while signaling conviction. Let me know if you want to jump on a quick call before Thursday and I can walk you through how I'd structure the term sheet.
